title: Issuance of Authority to Assess. The Department’s duly authorized
content: 16 representative shall issue the Authority to Assess, indicating therein the names of the 17 inspectors, the applicant and its registered address, the purpose of the assessment, and 18 the validity period of the authority. 19 20
